title: Habatok 2
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Habatok 2''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] sent by the [[Habassa]] to rescue the station crew of a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] assembly area. [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] led by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] oversaw the evacuation.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
